title: Milenge Milenge
subTitle: Priya believes she has met her destined lover when she meets and falls in love with Amit, but they soon part ways due to differences. Fate, however, perpetually conspires to bring them back together.

title: Salaam Venky
subTitle: Sujata, an ideal mother, faces the biggest challenge of her life when her son is diagnosed with muscular dystrophy. Despite this, she is determined to help her child live life to the fullest.

title: Boom
subTitle: Three clueless models bumble their way into the Bombay underworld after hilariously botching a diamond smuggling deal to the Middle East.

title: Attack
subTitle: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and traumatised with thoughts of his dead lover. When the attacker returns, Arjun puts his life on the line to serve his nation and seek revenge.

title: Nil Battey Sannata
subTitle: When Apeksha loses her interest in academics, her mother Chanda joins school to complete her education and motivate Apeksha.

title: Time Story
subTitle: Sethuraman, a scientist, invents a time-travelling gadget that his evil twin Athreya wants to get hold of. Soon, a bitter battle arises between Sethuraman's son and Athreya.

title: Raksha Bandhan
subTitle: Embracing his role as the provider, Lala Kedarnath puts personal romantic interests on the back burner until his quirky sisters can be married off into loving families.

title: Singham Again
subTitle: Drawing parallels to the Ramayana, Bajirao Singham and his team embark on a mission to rescue his wife, confronting a mysterious and formidable antagonist along the way.

title: Kisi Ka Bhai Kisi Ki Jaan
subTitle: Bhaijaan, the eldest of three siblings, refuses to get married to maintain harmony in his family. However, complications arise after his brothers conspire for him to fall in love.

title: Spyder
subTitle: Shiva, an intelligence officer, develops a phone software that helps him track those in need of help. He sets out to save the people of Hyderabad when he realises that a serial killer is on the loose.

title: Deva
subTitle: A police officer investigates the murder of his close friend. However, he suffers a traumatic accident that wipes away his memory, jeopardising the investigation.

title: Deva
subTitle: A police officer investigates the murder of his close friend. However, he suffers a traumatic accident that wipes away his memory, jeopardising the investigation.

title: Mere Pyare Prime Minister
subTitle: After his mother is raped one night, Kannu, an eight-year-old boy, writes a letter to the prime minister of India and embarks on a journey from Mumbai to Delhi with his two friends.

title: Sajini Shinde Ka Viral Video
subTitle: School teacher Sajini Shinde goes missing after a risque video of her is leaked on the internet. As the case becomes a public scandal, a police officer searches for the truth.

title: Bhoot Returns
subTitle: Tarun and Namrata move into a luxurious bungalow with Taman and Nimmi, their son and daughter respectively. However, strange occurrences start taking place and they must escape in order to survive.

title: F.A.L.T.U
subTitle: Four desperate friends, who secure poor grades in their examinations, concoct a fake university when they fail to secure college admissions and face dismal futures.

title: Hello Darling
subTitle: Candy, Mansi and Satvari are three good looking women who work at a fashion designing store. However, life isn't easy for them as their manager, Hardhik, always leches at them.

title: Radhe Shyam
subTitle: Despite being a doctor with no inclination towards superstitious beliefs, Prerana places her love and faith in Aditya, a palmist whose predictions turn out to be too spot-on to be disregarded.

title: Dhadak 2
subTitle: Nilesh and Vidhi fall in love with each other. However, tragedy strikes when the caste differences threaten to end their relationship.

title: Kho Gaye Hum Kahan
subTitle: Three friends in their twenties, Imaad, Ahana, and Neil, try to figure out life in an ever changing digital era. So, through love and heartbreak, they find support in each other.

title: Saaho
subTitle: An undercover agent and his partner go after a thief who has stolen 2,000 crore rupees. Soon, they realise that the case is linked to the death of a crime lord and an emerging gang war.

title: Pardes
subTitle: Kishorilal wants an Indian bride for his NRI son; he gets him engaged to Ganga, his friend's daughter. However, she seems to share a deeper bond with Arjun, Kishorilal's foster son.

title: Fukrey 3
subTitle: The Fukras plan to take over Delhi and run for city elections. However, they have no money, so they take on an international job to make a quick buck, which changes their lives forever.

title: Fukrey 3
subTitle: The Fukras plan to take over Delhi and run for city elections. However, they have no money, so they take on an international job to make a quick buck, which changes their lives forever.

title: Mercury
subTitle: After a high school reunion, five friends accidentally kill a blind man. Later, they are terrorised by the victim's vengeful ghost.

title: Dhokha
subTitle: A police officer (Muzammil Ibrahim) becomes a terrorist suspect after a deadly bombing at a club.

title: Kanjoos Makhichoos
subTitle: A man covertly saves money to fulfil his father's desire to go on the Char Dham Yatra. However, things change when his parents go missing due to heavy floods.

title: Game Paisa Ladki
subTitle: Struggling with the loss of her loved ones, Nazuk becomes entangled with a gangster, planning to extort him and his associates for a reward of 10 crore rupees, setting the stage for a dangerous game.

title: Vedaa
subTitle: Vedaa, a victim of caste discrimination, trains as a boxer under Abhimanyu and strives to seek justice for the murder of her siblings.

title: Koogle Kuttappa
subTitle: A conservative villager hates the idea of his son relocating to Russia for a job. However, when his son brings a robot to care for him, he develops an unlikely bond with the machine.

title: Shivam
subTitle: Shiva is a carefree lad who helps couples in love marry. Soon, he finds his own heart stolen, while being pursued by enemies determined to break them apart.

title: Aparichit - The Stranger
subTitle: A meek lawyer, frustrated with his inability to change the system, develops a vigilante alter-ego to mete out justice to criminals. However, the police soon set out to track down the vigilante.

title: Sooryavanshi
subTitle: With the looming threat of a terrorist attack on Mumbai, ATS chief Sooryavanshi embarks on a mission to hunt for 600 kgs of missing RDX and the conspiring perpetrators.

title: Khoonkhaar
subTitle: Gagan, a brave young man, is unable to be with Sweety, his true love, due to her parents' disapproval of him. However, he vows to protect her after unknowingly saving her from gangsters.
